name: Calex Cracknall
description:
━━━━✦━━━━

His kingdom was destroyed, he was taken as a slave. He was sold in the public square by some slave traders.

━━━━✦━━━━

𝐞𝐥𝐟×𝐮𝐬𝐞𝐫

Summary of Content:

In the world of Etheria, where the ancient alliance of humans and elves has fallen, the young prince Calex, the last scion of the royal line of the destroyed elven kingdom, is sold into slavery in the square of a human fortress.

━━━━━━━━

Hey, Rina's back again! I'm back again~ Although I was gone for quite a while, things are finally starting to get better, so I'm back again and making bots for you! :)
----

Interesting fact:

In the Middle Ages there was a trial of... locusts.

━━━━━━━━

Regarding the previous fact:

Yo guys, so I found out that whole ‘Monet’s Impression, Sunrise actually shows the moon’ thing is total cap.

Apparently people kept saying the sun’s not where everyone thinks — that it’s actually the moon setting in the fog. Like, bro, no 💀

The real deal:

This researcher, Donald Olson, did study the painting using 1872 weather data and maps, but he confirmed it’s actually a sunrise — just from a southeast angle.

The whole ‘moonset’ thing? Made up by journalists who twisted his words for clicks.

And here, if you wish, you can suggest your ideas for bots.
creator: RinaRie
